since_last: 73% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.35%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.34% · Gold -0.59% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 73% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.35%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.35%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.65%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +8.61%, INTC +8.17%, ASML +7.23%, KLAC +6.77%, AMAT +6.72%. Laggards: IBM -24.65%, ISRG -5.94%, ADBE -3.78%, SAP -3.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.26% at $137.8
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.26% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
